# projectRemoveLabel

Removes a label from a project.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`ProjectPayload`](../objects/project_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the project to remove the label from. |
| `labelId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the label to remove. |
